summary: Frontend-only smoke test of Anil Kumar Patnana DevOps portfolio (single-page React app). All requested scenarios passed: sections render, navigation smooth-scrolls, hero typewriter animates, mobile menu toggles, CTAs/footer have correct mailto and LinkedIn hrefs, projects (4) and testimonials (3) render. No console errors, no horizontal overflow on mobile (390) or desktop (1920).
passed: Landing page loads at root with 0 console errors
Renders hero-section, main-nav, projects-section, testimonials-section, contact-section, site-footer
Hero typewriter updates over time ('Building Sc' -> 'Building Scalable Cloud Infrastructure')
hero-cta-projects and hero-cta-connect present and clickable
Nav links about/projects/testimonials/contact each smooth-scroll target into viewport
All 4 project cards present: ci-cd-pipeline, aws-iac, k8s-microservices, monitoring-stack
3 testimonial logs render with names Sneha Reddy, Karthik Menon, Priya Iyer
footer-email = mailto:anilkumarpatnana555@gmail.com; footer-linkedin = correct LinkedIn URL
No horizontal overflow on mobile (390) or desktop (1920)
